name: tale-mode
description: Tale Mode — a discipline plugin for complex/high-stakes work, plus a self-armed autonomous goal loop (and an optional governor companion).

plugins.name: tale-mode
plugins.description: Discipline mode (staged planning, receipts, verify-against-source, adversarial review) + plan/kickoff commands + a plan-reviewer agent + a free Stop-hook autonomous goal loop (Layer 1, a deterministic gate).

plugins.name: tale-mode-governor
plugins.description: Optional companion to tale-mode: the read-only Sonnet governor (Layer 2). Adds a per-turn model call — install only if you want anchor-breaking when the loop is stuck.
